targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(*) as total_deployments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(finished_date)) as deployment_days,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(finished_date)), 1) as deploys_per_day
FROM lake.cicd_deployment_commits
WHERE result = 'SUCCESS'
  AND environment LIKE '%PRODUCTION%'
  AND finished_date >= '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(*) as total_deployments,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'FAILURE' THEN 1 END) as failed_deployments,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) as successful_deployments,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN result = 'FAILURE' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as failure_rate_pct
FROM lake.cicd_deployment_commits
WHERE environment LIKE '%PRODUCTION%'
  AND finished_date >= '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(*) as total_prs,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date)), 1) as avg_lead_time_hours,
  ROUND(MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date)), 1) as min_lead_time_hours,
  ROUND(MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date)), 1) as max_lead_time_hours
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN failed.finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(*) as total_failures,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, failed.finished_date, recovery.finished_date)), 1) as avg_recovery_hours,
  ROUND(MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, failed.finished_date, recovery.finished_date)), 1) as min_recovery_hours,
  ROUND(MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, failed.finished_date, recovery.finished_date)), 1) as max_recovery_hours
FROM lake.cicd_deployment_commits failed
JOIN lake.cicd_deployment_commits recovery ON 
  failed.cicd_scope_id = recovery.cicd_scope_id
  AND recovery.finished_date > failed.finished_date
  AND recovery.result = 'SUCCESS'
  AND recovery.finished_date = (
    SELECT MIN(finished_date)
    FROM lake.cicd_deployment_commits
    WHERE cicd_scope_id = failed.cicd_scope_id
      AND finished_date > failed.finished_date
      AND result = 'SUCCESS'
  )
WHERE failed.result = 'FAILURE'
  AND failed.environment LIKE '%PRODUCTION%'
  AND failed.finished_date >= '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN failed.finished_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(started_date, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') as time,
  AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_date, finished_date)) as avg_duration_minutes,
  COUNT(*) as job_count
FROM lake.cicd_tasks
WHERE finished_date IS NOT NULL
  AND started_date >= '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT 
  period,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'TODO' THEN hours_in_status ELSE 0 END) as total_wait_hours,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN hours_in_status ELSE 0 END) as total_process_hours,
  COUNT(DISTINCT issue_id) as total_issues,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'TODO' THEN hours_in_status ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT issue_id), 1) as avg_wait_per_issue,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN hours_in_status ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT issue_id), 1) as avg_process_per_issue
FROM (
  SELECT 
    ic.issue_id,
    ic.to_value as status,
    CASE 
      WHEN ic.created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
      ELSE 'After AI'
    END as period,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, ic.created_date,
      COALESCE(
        (SELECT MIN(ic2.created_date)
         FROM lake.issue_changelogs ic2
         WHERE ic2.issue_id = ic.issue_id
           AND ic2.created_date > ic.created_date
           AND ic2.field_name = 'status'),
        NOW()
      )) as hours_in_status
  FROM lake.issue_changelogs ic
  WHERE ic.created_date >= '2025-10-01'
    AND ic.field_name = 'status'
    AND ic.to_value IN ('TODO', 'IN_PROGRESS')
) status_durations
GROUP BY period;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN pr.created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) as total_prs,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, 
    (SELECT MIN(prc2.commit_authored_date)
     FROM lake.pull_request_commits prc2
     WHERE prc2.pull_request_id = pr.id),
    pr.created_date)), 1) as avg_hours_first_commit_to_pr
FROM lake.pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND pr.base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN pr.created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN pr.merged_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) as total_merged_prs,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) as prs_with_deployments,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pr.merged_date, d.finished_date)), 1) as avg_hours_to_deploy
FROM lake.pull_requests pr
JOIN lake.pull_request_commits prc ON pr.id = prc.pull_request_id
JOIN lake.cicd_deployment_commits d ON prc.commit_sha = d.commit_sha
WHERE pr.merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND pr.base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
  AND d.result = 'SUCCESS'
  AND d.environment LIKE '%PRODUCTION%'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN pr.merged_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN i.created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) as total_issues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ic.issue_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as issues_with_commits,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ic.issue_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT i.id), 1) as pct_with_commits
FROM lake.issues i
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT issue_id 
  FROM lake.issue_commits
) ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id
WHERE i.created_date >= '2025-10-01'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN i.created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) as total_issues_with_dates,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ic.issue_id) as issues_linked_to_commits,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) as prs_linked_to_issues
FROM lake.issues i
LEFT JOIN lake.issue_commits ic ON i.id = ic.issue_id
LEFT JOIN lake.pull_request_commits prc ON ic.commit_sha = prc.commit_sha
LEFT JOIN lake.pull_requests pr ON prc.pull_request_id = pr.id
WHERE i.created_date >= '2025-10-01';

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  COUNT(*) as total_issues,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN resolution_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as resolved_issues,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN lead_time_minutes IS NOT NULL THEN lead_time_minutes / 60.0 END), 1) as avg_lead_time_hours,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN lead_time_minutes IS NOT NULL THEN lead_time_minutes / 60.0 / 24.0 END), 1) as avg_lead_time_days
FROM lake.issues
WHERE created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND lead_time_minutes IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END;

SELECT 
  'Jira Issue Lead Time (days)' as metric,
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(lead_time_minutes / 60.0 / 24.0)
         FROM lake.issues
         WHERE created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
           AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
           AND lead_time_minutes IS NOT NULL), 1) as before_ai,
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(lead_time_minutes / 60.0 / 24.0)
         FROM lake.issues
         WHERE created_date >= '2026-01-01'
           AND lead_time_minutes IS NOT NULL), 1) as after_ai

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'PR Lead Time (hours)',
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
           AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 1),
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 1);

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  CONCAT(from_value, ' → ', to_value) as transition,
  COUNT(*) as transition_count,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, 
    (SELECT MAX(ic2.created_date) 
     FROM lake.issue_changelogs ic2 
     WHERE ic2.issue_id = ic.issue_id 
       AND ic2.created_date < ic.created_date
       AND ic2.field_name = 'status'),
    created_date)), 1) as avg_hours_in_previous_status
FROM lake.issue_changelogs ic
WHERE created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND field_name = 'status'
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END,
  CONCAT(from_value, ' → ', to_value)
ORDER BY period, transition_count DESC;

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01') as month,
  COUNT(*) as pr_count
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY month;

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01') as month,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) < 500 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as pct_small_prs
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY month;

SELECT 
  author_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 1 END) as prs_before,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_date >= '2026-01-01' THEN 1 END) as prs_after,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' 
    THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date) END), 1) as avg_hours_before,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_date >= '2026-01-01' 
    THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date) END), 1) as avg_hours_after,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' 
    THEN additions + deletions END), 0) as avg_size_before,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_date >= '2026-01-01' 
    THEN additions + deletions END), 0) as avg_size_after
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
  AND author_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY author_name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY (prs_before + prs_after) DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01') as month,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) < 100 THEN 1 END) as tiny,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) BETWEEN 100 AND 500 THEN 1 END) as small,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) BETWEEN 500 AND 1000 THEN 1 END) as medium,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) BETWEEN 1000 AND 5000 THEN 1 END) as large,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (additions + deletions) > 5000 THEN 1 END) as xlarge
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY month;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI (Oct-Dec 2025)'
    ELSE 'After AI (Jan-Apr 2026)'
  END as period,
  AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date)) as avg_hours_to_merge
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI (Oct-Dec 2025)'
  ELSE 'After AI (Jan-Apr 2026)'
END
ORDER BY period;

panels.title: PR Time to Merge - AI Impact

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
    ELSE 'After AI'
  END as period,
  AVG(additions + deletions) as avg_lines
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY CASE 
  WHEN created_date < '2026-01-01' THEN 'Before AI'
  ELSE 'After AI'
END
ORDER BY period;

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') as time_sec,
  AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date)) as avg_hours
FROM lake.pull_requests
WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
  AND created_date >= '2025-10-01'
  AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'
GROUP BY time_sec
ORDER BY time_sec;

SELECT 
  'PR Lead Time (hours)' as metric,
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
           AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 1) as before_ai,
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
           AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 1) as after_ai,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      ((SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
          AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780') -
       (SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
          AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780')) * 100.0 /
      (SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_date, merged_date))
       FROM lake.pull_requests
       WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
         AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
         AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
         AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'),
    1), '%') as pct_change,
  'Improved' as status

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'PR Size (lines)',
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(additions + deletions)
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
           AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 0),
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(additions + deletions)
         FROM lake.pull_requests
         WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
           AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
           AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
           AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'), 0),
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      ((SELECT AVG(additions + deletions)
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
          AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780') -
       (SELECT AVG(additions + deletions)
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
          AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780')) * 100.0 /
      (SELECT AVG(additions + deletions)
       FROM lake.pull_requests
       WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
         AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
         AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
         AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'),
    1), '%'),
  'Smaller PRs'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'PR Throughput',
  (SELECT COUNT(*)
   FROM lake.pull_requests
   WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
     AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
     AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
     AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'),
  (SELECT COUNT(*)
   FROM lake.pull_requests
   WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
     AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
     AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
     AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'),
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      ((SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2026-01-01'
          AND created_date <= '2026-04-30'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780') -
       (SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM lake.pull_requests
        WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
          AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
          AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
          AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780')) * 100.0 /
      (SELECT COUNT(*)
       FROM lake.pull_requests
       WHERE merged_date IS NOT NULL
         AND created_date >= '2025-10-01' 
         AND created_date < '2026-01-01'
         AND base_repo_id = 'github:GithubRepo:1:828624780'),
    1), '%'),
  'More PRs';
